title: Realistic Prism Hands
description: High-res for free! & realistic hands, I guess?
body:
![LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/0hVc9XV.jpg)

![homepage][1] [![homepage][2]][3] [![homepage][4]][5]

## Realistic High Res Hands in Vanilla Minecraft?
![info](https://i.imgur.com/BhicCzB.png) ![info](https://i.imgur.com/EiTamXH.png) ![info](https://i.imgur.com/xOogaBt.png)
### _Yeah, It's cursed.. We know..._

**Realistic Hands** is realistic to a fault, designed to enhance your game with a touch of natural beauty. It's subtle, refined, and compatible with a range of systems.

## [The Prism Version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/realistic-prism-hands) With Summit 64x & [Bliss Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader):
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/SDOc2St.jpeg)
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/qv5BEwJ.jpeg)
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/WR49k60.jpeg)
